systems.system_notes: Femoral intramedullary nailing platform within the TRIGEN family for antegrade and retrograde femoral fracture fixation.

trays.tray_notes: Official Smith+Nephew materials support the TRIGEN femoral nail platform with dedicated operative instrumentation.

components.component_notes: Official product materials describe the TRIGEN femoral nail platform for femoral fracture fixation.
The TRIGEN femoral nail construct includes proximal and distal locking fixation options.
The TRIGEN femoral nail platform includes end-cap compatibility within the nail construct.

unresolved_items.raw_text: The public TRIGEN pages define the nail platform and fixation family but do not expose a public implant code table in this pass.
unresolved_items.reason: A deeper operative-technique or catalogue pass is required for product-code detail.
unresolved_items.source_excerpt: Current extraction remains at tray and implant-family level.
